zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Olven於1530年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾可希頓時，她的父親William Oliver20歲，母親Isabel Majors18歲。她於1583年4月6日與John Webster III在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1594年10月11日在她的家鄉享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Olven于1530年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾可希頓时，她的父亲William Oliver20岁，母亲Isabel Majors18岁。她于1583年4月6日与John Webster III在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1594年10月11日在她的家乡享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Olven
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Ludvig, Nils, Selmer.
Swedish (Lövén): ornamental name from löv ‘leaf’ + the adjectival suffix -én, a derivative of Latin -enius ‘relating to’. Compare Lowen 3.
Swedish (Lovén): ornamental name from lov ‘praise’ + the adjectival suffix -én (see 1 above).

variants.name: Lovan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Nien, Anh, Banh, Bao, Cau, Chanh, Diem, Dzung, Ha, Hoa, Lieng, Mai.
Altered form of English or perhaps Dutch   Loven  .

Vietnamese: apparently from a combination of two personal names (an unidentified middle name simplified as Lo and the personal name Văn meaning ‘literature’) recorded as a surname after immigration of its bearers to the US.

variants.name: Lowen
meanings: English: variant of   Lewin   1 or   Loving   1.
German (Löwen): variant of Löwe ‘lion’ (see Lowe 2). Compare Loewen 1.
Swedish (Löwen, Löwén): presumably derived from German Löwe (see Lowe 2) or Löwen (see 2 above), although the Swedish forms could equally be ornamental names from löv ‘leaf’ (see Loven 1).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Olven was born in 1530, in Cossington, Leicestershire, England, her father, William Oliver, was 20 and her mother, Isabel Majors, was 18. She married John Webster III on 6 April 1583, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 11 October 1594, in her hometown, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Olven est née en 1530, à Cossington, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, William Oliver, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Isabel Majors, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé John Webster III le 6 avril 1583, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 octobre 1594, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Olven 1530 in Cossington, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Oliver 20 und ihre Mutter Isabel Majors 18. Sie hat am 6. April 1583 in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom John Webster III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. Oktober 1594 im Alter von 64 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Olven è nata il nel 1530 nel Cossington, Leicestershire, England, sua padre, William Oliver, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Isabel Majors, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato John Webster III il 6 aprile 1583, nel Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 11 ottobre 1594, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Olvenが1530年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアコシントンで生まれた時，父William Oliverは20歳，母Isabel Majorsは18歳であった。1583年4月6日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアでJohn Webster IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1594年10月11日に故郷で64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Olven(이)가 1530년 영국 레이스스터실르 코징턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Oliver(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Majors(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1583년 4월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 John Webster III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1594년 10월 11일 그녀의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Olven nasceu em 1530, em Cossington, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Oliver, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Majors, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com John Webster III em 6 de abril de 1583, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de outubro de 1594, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Olven родилась в 1530 г. в местности коссингтон, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Oliver было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Majors, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Webster III 6 апреля 1583 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 11 октября 1594 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Olven nació en 1530, en Cossington, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Oliver, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Isabel Majors, tenía 18 años. Se casó con John Webster III el 6 de abril de 1583, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 11 de octubre de 1594, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años.
